summary: iOS 🟥 FLAMINGO | FALCON | Language change does not update FW on Charge Case
scenario: Language change does not trigger firmware update on Charge Case after DFU completes
description_clean: When a language change is triggered, the Charge Case does not receive the firmware update. After DFU completes, the Charge Case remains on outdated firmware. Expected behavior: language change should trigger firmware update on all components, including the Charge Case.
steps: 1. Trigger a language change on the device.
3. Wait for DFU (Device Firmware Update) to complete.
4. Check the firmware version on the Charge Case.
expected: Language change should trigger firmware update on all components, including the Charge Case. After DFU completes, the Charge Case should be on the updated firmware.
actual: After DFU completes, the Charge Case remains on outdated firmware. The Charge Case does not receive the firmware update when a language change is triggered.
